001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.app.Dialog;
004import android.os.Bundle;
005import android.view.LayoutInflater;
006import android.widget.ArrayAdapter;
007import android.widget.TextView;
008import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
009import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
010import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog;
011import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
012import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
013import com.google.android.material.datepicker.MaterialDatePicker;
014import com.google.android.material.dialog.MaterialAlertDialogBuilder;
015import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.DialogAddBatchBinding;
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.BatchViewModel;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.IncubatorViewModel;
022import java.time.Instant;
023import java.time.LocalDate;
024import java.time.ZoneId;
025import java.time.format.DateTimeParseException;
026import java.util.ArrayList;
027import java.util.List;
028import java.util.function.Consumer;
029
030@AndroidEntryPoint
031public class AddBatchDialogFragment extends DialogFragment {
032
033  private DialogAddBatchBinding binding;
034  private BatchViewModel batchViewModel;
035  private IncubatorViewModel incubatorViewModel;
036
037  private final List<Incubator> incubators = new ArrayList<>();
038
039  @NonNull
040  @Override
041  public Dialog onCreateDialog(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
042    binding = DialogAddBatchBinding.inflate(LayoutInflater.from(requireContext()));
043
044    batchViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(BatchViewModel.class);
045    incubatorViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(IncubatorViewModel.class);
046
047    setupIncubatorDropdown();
048    setupDatePickers();
049
050    AlertDialog dialog = new MaterialAlertDialogBuilder(requireContext())
051        .setTitle(R.string.title_add_batch)
052        .setView(binding.getRoot())
053        .setNegativeButton(android.R.string.cancel, (dialogInterface, which) -> {})
054        .setPositiveButton(R.string.action_save, null)
055        .create();
056
057    dialog.setOnShowListener(d ->
058        dialog.getButton(AlertDialog.BUTTON_POSITIVE).setOnClickListener(v -> saveBatch()));
059
060    return dialog;
061  }
062
063  private void setupIncubatorDropdown() {
064    incubatorViewModel.getActiveIncubators().observe(this, incubatorList -> {
065      incubators.clear();
066      if (incubatorList != null) {
067        incubators.addAll(incubatorList);
068      }
069
070      List<String> labels = new ArrayList<>();
071      for (Incubator incubator : incubators) {
072        labels.add(incubator.getName());
073      }
074
075      ArrayAdapter<String> adapter = new ArrayAdapter<>(
076          requireContext(),
077          android.R.layout.simple_list_item_1,
078          labels
079      );
080      binding.incubator.setAdapter(adapter);
081    });
082  }
083
084  private void setupDatePickers() {
085    binding.dateSet.setOnClickListener(v ->
086        showDatePicker(selectedDate -> {
087          binding.dateSet.setText(selectedDate.toString());
088
089          if (isBlank(binding.lockdownDate)) {
090            binding.lockdownDate.setText(selectedDate.plusDays(18).toString());
091          }
092          if (isBlank(binding.expectedHatchDate)) {
093            binding.expectedHatchDate.setText(selectedDate.plusDays(21).toString());
094          }
095        })
096    );
097
098    binding.lockdownDate.setOnClickListener(v ->
099        showDatePicker(date -> binding.lockdownDate.setText(date.toString()))
100    );
101
102    binding.expectedHatchDate.setOnClickListener(v ->
103        showDatePicker(date -> binding.expectedHatchDate.setText(date.toString()))
104    );
105  }
106
107  private void showDatePicker(@NonNull Consumer<LocalDate> consumer) {
108    MaterialDatePicker<Long> picker = MaterialDatePicker.Builder.datePicker()
109        .build();
110
111    picker.addOnPositiveButtonClickListener(selection -> {
112      LocalDate date = Instant.ofEpochMilli(selection)
113          .atZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
114          .toLocalDate();
115      consumer.accept(date);
116    });
117
118    picker.show(getChildFragmentManager(), "date_picker");
119  }
120
121  private void saveBatch() {
122    clearErrors();
123
124    Integer batchNumber = parseInteger(textOf(binding.batchNumber));
125    String breed = textOf(binding.breed);
126    String incubatorName = textOf(binding.incubator);
127    LocalDate dateSet = parseDate(textOf(binding.dateSet));
128    LocalDate lockdownDate = parseDate(textOf(binding.lockdownDate));
129    LocalDate expectedHatchDate = parseDate(textOf(binding.expectedHatchDate));
130    Integer numEggsSet = parseInteger(textOf(binding.numEggsSet));
131    String notes = textOf(binding.notes);
132
133    boolean valid = true;
134
135    if (batchNumber == null) {
136      binding.batchNumberLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_batch_number_required));
137      valid = false;
138    }
139
140    if (breed.isBlank()) {
141      binding.breedLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_breed_required));
142      valid = false;
143    }
144
145    Incubator selectedIncubator = findIncubatorByName(incubatorName);
146    if (selectedIncubator == null) {
147      binding.incubatorLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_incubator_required));
148      valid = false;
149    }
150
151    if (dateSet == null) {
152      binding.dateSetLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_date_required));
153      valid = false;
154    }
155
156    if (lockdownDate == null) {
157      binding.lockdownDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_date_required));
158      valid = false;
159    }
160
161    if (expectedHatchDate == null) {
162      binding.expectedHatchDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_date_required));
163      valid = false;
164    }
165
166    if (numEggsSet == null || numEggsSet <= 0) {
167      binding.numEggsSetLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_egg_count_required));
168      valid = false;
169    }
170
171    if (dateSet != null && lockdownDate != null && lockdownDate.isBefore(dateSet)) {
172      binding.lockdownDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_lockdown_before_set));
173      valid = false;
174    }
175
176    if (lockdownDate != null && expectedHatchDate != null
177        && expectedHatchDate.isBefore(lockdownDate)) {
178      binding.expectedHatchDateLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_hatch_before_lockdown));
179      valid = false;
180    }
181
182    if (!valid || selectedIncubator == null || batchNumber == null || dateSet == null
183        || lockdownDate == null || expectedHatchDate == null || numEggsSet == null) {
184      return;
185    }
186
187    Batch batch = new Batch();
188    batch.setBatchNumber(batchNumber);
189    batch.setIncubatorId(selectedIncubator.getId());
190    batch.setDateSet(dateSet);
191    batch.setLockdownDate(lockdownDate);
192    batch.setExpectedHatchDate(expectedHatchDate);
193    batch.setNumEggsSet(numEggsSet);
194    batch.setNotes(notes.isBlank() ? null : notes);
195    batch.setBatchStatus("ACTIVE");
196
197    batchViewModel.saveWithInitialEggGroups(batch, breed)
198        .thenAccept(batchId -> {
199          if (isAdded()) {
200            requireActivity().runOnUiThread(this::dismiss);
201          }
202        })
203        .exceptionally(throwable -> {
204          if (isAdded()) {
205            requireActivity().runOnUiThread(() ->
206                binding.notesLayout.setError(getString(R.string.error_save_batch)));
207          }
208          return null;
209        });
210  }
211
212  private void clearErrors() {
213    binding.batchNumberLayout.setError(null);
214    binding.incubatorLayout.setError(null);
215    binding.breedLayout.setError(null);
216    binding.dateSetLayout.setError(null);
217    binding.lockdownDateLayout.setError(null);
218    binding.expectedHatchDateLayout.setError(null);
219    binding.numEggsSetLayout.setError(null);
220    binding.notesLayout.setError(null);
221  }
222
223  @Nullable
224  private Integer parseInteger(@NonNull String value) {
225    if (value.isBlank()) {
226      return null;
227    }
228    try {
229      return Integer.valueOf(value);
230    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
231      return null;
232    }
233  }
234
235  @Nullable
236  private LocalDate parseDate(@NonNull String value) {
237    if (value.isBlank()) {
238      return null;
239    }
240    try {
241      return LocalDate.parse(value);
242    } catch (DateTimeParseException e) {
243      return null;
244    }
245  }
246
247  @NonNull
248  private String textOf(@NonNull TextView view) {
249    return view.getText() == null ? "" : view.getText().toString().trim();
250  }
251
252  private boolean isBlank(@NonNull TextView view) {
253    return textOf(view).isBlank();
254  }
255
256  @Nullable
257  private Incubator findIncubatorByName(@NonNull String name) {
258    for (Incubator incubator : incubators) {
259      if (name.equals(incubator.getName())) {
260        return incubator;
261      }
262    }
263    return null;
264  }
265
266  @Override
267  public void onDestroyView() {
268    binding = null;
269    super.onDestroyView();
270  }
271}
